title: Grilled Tofu with Australian Toasty Sauce
description: A unique and flavorful dish featuring grilled tofu served with a tangy Australian-inspired toasty sauce.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: 2. Season tofu with salt and pepper. Brush grill with olive oil.
3. Grill tofu for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and slightly charred.
4. In a blender or food processor, combine toasty, australian-style barbecue sauce, and 2 tbsp water. Blend until smooth.
5. Serve tofu with toasty sauce spooned over the top.
6. Garnish with additional toasty sauce, if desired.
